mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM eb_merchant_user emu LEFT JOIN eb_user eu ON emu.uid = eu.id WHERE emu.mer_id = #{merId} AND eu.is_logoff = 0

SELECT count(DISTINCT ebr.uid) FROM eb_merchant_user emu LEFT JOIN eb_browse_record ebr ON emu.uid = ebr.uid LEFT JOIN eb_product ep ON ep.id = ebr.product_id WHERE emu.mer_id = #{merId} AND ep.mer_id = #{merId} AND ebr.date between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

SELECT count(DISTINCT eo.uid) FROM eb_merchant_user emu LEFT JOIN eb_order eo ON emu.uid = eo.uid WHERE emu.mer_id = #{merId} AND eo.is_del = 0 AND eo.mer_id = #{merId} AND eo.paid = 1 AND date_format(eo.pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{startTime} and #{endTime}

SELECT count(DISTINCT ebr.uid) FROM eb_merchant_user emu LEFT JOIN eb_browse_record ebr ON emu.uid = ebr.uid LEFT JOIN eb_product ep ON ep.id = ebr.product_id WHERE emu.mer_id = 7 AND ep.mer_id = 7 AND date LIKE CONCAT(#{date}, '%') -- 如果 date 是年月格式 AND CASE WHEN #{date} REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN CASE WHEN #{date} = LEFT(#{startTime}, 7) THEN ebr.date >= #{startTime} WHEN #{date} = LEFT(#{endTime}, 7) THEN ebr.date <= #{endTime} ELSE 1=1 END -- 如果 date 是年格式 WHEN #{date} REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}$' THEN CASE WHEN #{date} = LEFT(#{startTime}, 4) THEN ebr.date >= #{startTime} WHEN #{date} = LEFT(#{endTime}, 4) THEN ebr.date <= #{endTime} ELSE 1=1 END ELSE 1=1 END
